title: Rewarding Structural Conformance of Reasoning using Process Mining

method.approach: Extract reasoning traces of a pretrained teacher model as event logs and use Process Mining to evaluate reasoning quality at the process level
techniques: Inductive miner (IM) to construct process models from the policy model's reasoning process
Alignment-based conformance checking (CC) to compare induced process models with the teacher model's reasoning process
method.reward_design: Integrates process-level conformance checking into the reward signal of GRPO
method.philosophy: Encourages reasoning alignment while preserving the model's freedom of thought

results.content: Presents experimental results demonstrating the effectiveness of PM4GRPO

paper_structure.section_2: Describes the proposed PM4GRPO framework in detail
paper_structure.section_4: Concludes the paper with a summary and future research directions
